prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-OPENRESCUEKNIFE-BLK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 8.25 Inch Tactical Folding Rescue Knife with Seatbelt Cutter, Black Description: Don't get caught in an emergency without the ASR Outdoor Rescue Knife.

This knife features an overall length of 8.25" unfolded, and the serrated blade is about 3.5" in length. The knife itself has a belt clip on the black-colored handle. It can easily be opened with the simple push of your thumb.

This emergency knife also comes with a seat belt cutter and window punch in case of an auto emergency. Make sure to keep one of these in your pocket, backpack, bug-out bag, or vehicle in case of an emergency. Search Terms: pocket knives multi tools camping hunting EDC every day carry thumb assist stainless steel blades collectible folding liner lock semi serrated drop point emergency belt cutter razor glass windshield window breaker smooth action Features: - SERRATED FOLDING KNIFE - The ASR Outdoor folding pocket knife features a serrated blade, making it the ideal tool for cutting through belts and ropes, fabric and various other textured materials. - WINDOW PUNCH AND SEATBELT CUTTER - This emergency pocket knife comes with 2 emergency devices that will help get you out of a bad situation in the event of an auto emergency - a seat belt cutter and window punch. - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - The pocket knife is made of durable 3CR13 stainless steel that wont rust, so you can count on it rain or shine. - POCKET CLIP - The knife also comes with a steel pocket clip so you can easily keep it stored in your pocket to keep the blade safe when not in use. - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall length: 8.25" unfolded; Folded length: 4.75"; Blade length: 3.25"; Color: black; Material: 3CR13 stainless steel; Thumb assist open === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.25" Black Tactical Folding Rescue Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.25in Black Tactical Folding Rescue Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Serrated Blade, Seatbelt Cutter, Window Punch, Thumb Assist, Stainless Steel, Pocket Clip

openai.title_differentiation: Serrated Blade, Seatbelt Cutter, Window Punch, 3CR13 Stainless Steel, Pocket Clip, Thumb Assist Open
